text:
41 PRs merged this week. We packed up the generation gateway and moved it to gen.pollinations.ai — update your bookmarks. Also wired up GPT-5.5, Llama 3.3, and AssemblyAI for speech-to-text. Nova Reel video generation now supports seeds, so your outputs can finally be deterministic. BYOP got some strict redirect_uri allowlists because security is nice. Plus, four new community apps in the showcase. The infrastructure grows. 

Docs and endpoints are updated. Link in bio.

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #buildinpublic #gamedev #webdev
